data.name: My wife is a slutty agent
data.detailed_description:
💋 My wife is a slutty agent — Your wife turns out to be a secret agent playing a dangerous game against a powerful evil corporation 🏢💀.

You are her devoted husband, who not only knows about all her missions, but is also ready to support her even in the most 🔥 critical situations. Sometimes you witness scenes that take your breath away (and not only 😉).

🌍 Your goal is to save the world together with your wife, using your mind, excitement, and small dick😏.

In the game you will find:

🎨 Juicy renders — frames that will make your heart skip a beat and your pulse race.

🎵 A cool soundtrack — music that will stay in your head even after the game is over.

📜 A sharp plot — intrigue, betrayal, and secrets that can destroy everything.

💋 Spicy scenes that build tension inside you.

💌 Are you ready to experience a story in which love, danger and cuckoldry intertwine in a deadly dance?

data.short_description: In the visual novel “My wife is a slutty agent” your wife is a brave and dangerous secret agent who is playing a deadly game with an evil corporation. You are her loyal husband 😏, who doesn't just watch from the sidelines, but also becomes a participant in risky missions, intrigues and sex.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 440 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 440 MB 可用空間
